title: SACRAMENTO, CA
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: Assembly Bill 92 aims to limit body armor use in mass shootings.
Assembly Bill 404 seeks to evaluate the reporting requirements for organic farmers to limit redundancy.
Assembly Bill 620 mandates health plans to cover Inflammatory Bowel Disease testing and treatment.
Assembly Bill 935 explicitly authorizes the enforcement of the ban on flavored tobacco.
Assembly Bill 1109 restricts online sales of sodium nitrite to minors.
Assembly Bill 1132 extends the limitation on permit fees for solar energy systems until January 1, 2034.
